# Support

- **Documentation:** [docs/](https://github.com/craevidence/cli/blob/main/docs/README.md)
  (registered CRA Evidence users can also sign in at
  https://docs.craevidence.com/cli-reference)
- **Bugs and feature requests:** open an issue using the templates.
- **Security reports:** see [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md). Do not open a public
  issue for a vulnerability.
- **Product questions:** support@craevidence.com
